FAQ (Engraving)
Q: Can I get the caseback engraved?
A: Yes. We offer caseback engraving in

metadata.answer: Yes. We offer caseback engraving in
metadata.question: Can I get the caseback engraved?

results.content:
BOLDR Engraving Service: Caseback engraving — up to 20 characters
Price: SGD 25.0
Notes: Standard Roman/Latin script only

CS SOP — Enquiry Type: 4.2 Engraving
Examples: Can I engrave a message? How many characters? What fonts? Can I change my engraving after ordering?
What to do: Use the Engraving Rate Card. Key things to remember:
Standard text engraving: up to 40 characters including spaces
Pricing: SGD 25 for up to 20 chars, SGD 35 for 21-40 chars
If the customer wants to change/cancel an engraving AFTER ordering:
Within 1 hour of order: amend for free — update the order note in Shopify
1-24 hours after order: SGD 15 amendment fee — check with team before confirming
After production has started: not possible — let customer know politely
Logo or custom artwork: flag for team review, ask customer to send vector file
⚠ Engraved items cannot be returned unless there is a manufacturing defect. Remind customers to double-check spelling before confirming.
